testcase.name: test_auto_check_returns_valid_response
test_batch_mark_sent_empty_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_reminders_batch.py:94: in test_batch_mark_sent_empty_list assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_batch_mark_sent_nonexistent_ids
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_reminders_batch.py:111: in test_batch_mark_sent_nonexistent_ids assert data["marked"] >= 0 # Should be 0 since IDs don't exist ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'marked'

testcase.name: test_auto_check_and_tomorrow_reminders_consistency
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_reminders_batch.py:166: in test_auto_check_and_tomorrow_reminders_consistency assert auto_data["total"] == len(tomorrow_data), \ ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'total'
